Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface GamesAuth

All Superinterfaces:
Games
public interface GamesAuth extends Games

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface chariot.api.Games

    Games.ChannelFilter, Games.CommonGameParameters<T>, Games.CommonLichessOpeningExplorer<T>, Games.CommonOpeningExplorer<T>, Games.EvalsAndPlayers<T>, Games.Filter, Games.GameParams, Games.LichessBuilder, Games.MastersBuilder, Games.PlayerBuilder, Games.SearchFilter

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Result<GameImport>
    importGame(String pgn)
    Import a game from PGN.
    Rate limiting: 200 games per hour for OAuth requests, 100 games per hour for anonymous requests.
    See importGame(java.lang.String) for authenticated access.
    To broadcast ongoing games, consider pushing to a broadcast instead.
    Result<GameInfo>
    ongoing()
     
    Result<GameInfo>
    ongoing(int nb)

    See ongoing()

    Deprecated.
    See ongoing(int)

    • importGame

      Result<GameImport> importGame(String pgn)
      Description copied from interface: Games
      Import a game from PGN.
      Rate limiting: 200 games per hour for OAuth requests, 100 games per hour for anonymous requests.
      See importGame(java.lang.String) for authenticated access.
      To broadcast ongoing games, consider pushing to a broadcast instead. See BroadcastsAuth.pushPgnByRoundId(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      Specified by:
      importGame in interface Games
